name: webnotes-builder
description: Converts a folder of course material (PDF slides, markdown, txt, images, past exams, assignments) into a complete interactive HTML study site. Two goal modes: PASS (mines past-exam patterns, builds an exam-prep page with model answers as the centerpiece, teaches only what's needed to pass) and MASTER (full-fidelity beginner-friendly coverage of all material). One chapter page per source file with an intuition-first essence opener, per-section quizzes, annotated code, CSS diagrams, flashcards, and a cross-chapter test. Can also enhance an existing webnotes site to this standard. Includes content-fidelity guarantees, a chunked multi-session workflow with state persistence, and multi-agent role orchestration. Works for CS, math, algorithms, networking, databases, logic programming, and other technical subjects.
author: thanos2940
